usually like to start people on Mondays where, you know, it doesn't mention hiring.
some of people were trying to have people kind of like starting these onboarding classes and then bring them through a variety of different onboarding sessions.
Yeah.
If you can make that week or the following, whatever it is, that would be awesome.
But anyways, I'll have them really a reach out about the details.
great, great talking with you.
Great talking to you too, Kyle.
Thank you so much.
All right.
Take care for us.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Kristel Seracarpio's background and potential fit for a Content Manager role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kristel has diverse experience in content, SEO, and digital marketing, with multilingual capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [growthx.ai uses AI-powered workflows to scale high-quality content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [The Content Manager role involves research, strategy collaboration, and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Flexible remote work arrangements are possible, with some overlap with Pacific Time zone](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)

## Topics

### Kristel's Professional Background

  - [Started in FinTech (2011-2015) before transitioning to writing and digital marketing](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Progressed from social media writer to content manager and digital marketing roles](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Currently working in product marketing, with experience in SEO, email marketing, and team management](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Multilingual: speaks Tagalog, Ilongo, Visaya, and English; learning German](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

### growthx.ai's Business Model and Growth

  - [Offers editorial content and program work streams](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Recently closed Series A funding, aiming to grow from \~35 to 70 employees by June](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Unique hybrid of software development and service provision ("software as a service")](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Leverages AI-powered workflows for efficient, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Content Manager Role and Responsibilities

  - [Collaborate on strategy development with managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Conduct keyword research and content opportunity analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Optimize AI-generated content through iterative prompting and editing](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Enable and guide writers for content expansion and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Potential for role evolution as the company grows and develops new features](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

### growthx.ai's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AirOps workflow tool (transitioning to proprietary solution)](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Multi-step process involving AI-generated content and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Incorporates company context, keyword research, and audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Allows for high-volume content production (e.g., 10 blogs per week for some clients)](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Remote Work and Time Zone Considerations

  - [Generally requires 4 hours of overlap with Pacific Time zone](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Flexible scheduling for client meetings (typically Wednesdays and Thursdays)](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Open to accommodating individual preferences and circumstances](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Focus on getting work done rather than strict hour requirements](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marilia to reach out to Kristel with further details about the role
  - [Potential start date of April 14th or the following week to be confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Kristel to provide 30 days notice to current employer if offer is extended](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [growthx.ai to consider Kristel for upcoming onboarding class with other new hires](https://fathom.video/share/Eurq278BRfNDJt4zEfC9zjXNXHxtscEN?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)

action_items.description: Have Marilia reach out to Kristel re job details, potential Apr 14 start date
